archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury / Premium SaaS) integrated with Emergent UI design
mood: Cinematic, moody, elite, high-contrast, technical sophistication

bento_grid.item_classes: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col

surfaces.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#050505]/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 saturate-150
surfaces.sidebar: h-full w-64 bg-[#050505] border-r border-white/5 flex flex-col
surfaces.card_default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl shadow-sm transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-medium tracking-wide hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.1)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/15 text-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors

inputs.text: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-white/30 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/30 transition-all placeholder:text-gray-600
inputs.file_dropzone: border-2 border-dashed border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:border-white/30 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all cursor-pointer group

chat_ui.message_user: bg-[#141414] text-white rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm px-6 py-4 max-w-[80%] self-end border border-white/5
chat_ui.message_ai: bg-transparent text-gray-200 px-6 py-4 max-w-[85%] self-start flex gap-4 items-start
chat_ui.ai_avatar: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-white text-black flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 font-bold
chat_ui.input_box: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-full flex items-center px-2 py-2 focus-within:border-white/30 focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-white/30 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the BLACK THEME UI. Avoid using any other dominant color backgrounds. Stick to #050505 and #0A0A0A.
Do not use generic 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Load them via Google Fonts.
For icons, install and use 'lucide-react'. They match the minimal aesthetic.
For charts in the Report Page, use 'recharts' library. Customize chart colors to use white/gray/transparent combinations rather than default multi-colors.
Ensure all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, specific cards) have a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case role-based names.
On the landing page, implement a hero section with a subtle gradient overlay or grain texture over the hero background image to preserve text readability.
In the AI Interview Chat UI, use the specified component classes to create a ChatGPT-style layout that feels cinematic and focused.
Use pure HTML and Tailwind for layout structures, leaning on grid and flexbox. Avoid Shadcn components for macro layouts, use them only for complex logic (Modals, Select, etc.) if needed.
Implement the 'Emergent UI' feel by using 1px white/10 borders on deep black backgrounds, combined with extremely subtle hover states.
